pr.title: Sync upstream openai/codex (manual conflicts)
pr.body:
Automated upstream sync from `openai/codex@main`.

This PR must pass the same checks and review as any other change.

Manual conflict resolution is required.

The sync branch points at `openai/codex@main` so GitHub can keep this PR open with native merge conflicts against `main`.

Resolve the conflicts in this PR, then mark it ready for review.

Conflicted paths from the attempted merge:

```
.github/workflows/ci.yml
.github/workflows/rust-ci-full.yml
.github/workflows/rust-ci.yml
codex-cli/bin/codex.js
codex-cli/scripts/README.md
codex-cli/scripts/build_npm_package.py
codex-cli/scripts/install_native_deps.py
codex-rs/app-server-protocol/schema/typescript/ClientRequest.ts
codex-rs/app-server/src/request_processors/thread_summary.rs
codex-rs/app-server/src/request_processors/turn_processor.rs
codex-rs/core/src/config/config_tests.rs
codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs
codex-rs/core/src/hook_runtime.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/send_input.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents_v2/followup_task.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/shell/shell_command.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec/exec_command.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec/write_stdin.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec_tests.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/spec_plan.rs
codex-rs/core/src/tools/tool_family/shell.rs
codex-rs/hooks/src/events/stop.rs
scripts/install/install.ps1
scripts/install/install.sh
scripts/stage_npm_packages.py
```

Sync branch commit: `7d47056ea42636271ac020b86347fbbef49490aa`
pr.author: manoelcalixto
